title: Hallmark Pack of 6 Mothers Day Cards and Envelopes (Thinking of You)
features: Wish the great moms in your life a very happy Mother's Day with a pack of cards for all the wonderful women who deserve to be celebrated.
Card pack contains six cards in a single design. Cover features glitter accented butterflies and gold foil lettering that reads: "Thinking of you on Mother's Day."
Inside reads: "More places to find joy, more reasons to laugh, and more moments you'll never forget . . . that's what I wish for you today and always."
Buy in bulk to spread the love to all your friends and family. Cheerful design is perfect for anyone, and makes a great accompaniment to a Mother's Day gift.
Mother's Day cards measure 5" x 7.2" and come with coordinating envelopes. Printed on high quality paper stock, Hallmark's eco-friendly greeting cards are made with paper from well-managed forests.
description: With a pretty foil and glitter accented design, and warm sentiment inside, this convenient card pack is the perfect way to wish a Happy Mother's Day to your mom, stepmom, mother-in-law, grandma, sister, aunt, niece, cousin, wife, girlfriend, partner or other important woman in your life. There's nothing like a note from the heart to let your friends and family know how wonderful you think they are, on Mother's Day and all year long. The Hallmark brand is widely recognized as the very best for greeting cards, gift wrap, and more. For more than 100 years, Hallmark has been helping its customers make everyday moments more beautiful and celebrations more joyful.
